title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Salesforce India Ventures Solutions in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
